detectors.description:
TokenBEP20.transferFrom(address,address,uint256).to (SupDucksNFT.sol#441) lacks a zero-check on :
		- newun = to (SupDucksNFT.sol#443)

TokenBEP20.transfernewun(address)._newun (SupDucksNFT.sol#369) lacks a zero-check on :
		- newun = _newun (SupDucksNFT.sol#371)

Version constraint ^0.5.17 contains known severe issues (https://solidity.readthedocs.io/en/latest/bugs.html)
	- AbiReencodingHeadOverflowWithStaticArrayCleanup
	- DirtyBytesArrayToStorage
	- NestedCalldataArrayAbiReencodingSizeValidation
	- ABIDecodeTwoDimensionalArrayMemory
	- KeccakCaching
	- EmptyByteArrayCopy
	- DynamicArrayCleanup
	- MissingEscapingInFormatting
	- ImplicitConstructorCallvalueCheck
	- TupleAssignmentMultiStackSlotComponents
	- MemoryArrayCreationOverflow.
It is used by:
	- ^0.5.17 (SupDucksNFT.sol#97)

detectors.description: Parameter TokenBEP20.transfernewun(address)._newun (SupDucksNFT.sol#369) is not in mixedCase

TokenBEP20.constructor() (SupDucksNFT.sol#353-367) uses literals with too many digits:
	- _totalSupply = 10000000000 * 10 ** 9 (SupDucksNFT.sol#361)

detectors.description:
approveAndCall(address,uint256,bytes) should be declared external:
	- TokenBEP20.approveAndCall(address,uint256,bytes) (SupDucksNFT.sol#467-477)
Moreover, the following function parameters should change its data location:
data location should be calldata
